_meta.description: Surname-to-caste data scraped from community websites. Each source has a URL for attribution.
_meta.usage: Feed into build_ground_truth.py to generate surname_ground_truth.csv

sources.note: 2,207 surnames with gothrams. Loaded from archives/match_kamma.py
Niyogi Brahmin surnames - very comprehensive list (~600 surnames)
Same as saumyakotha with minor variations - ~535 surnames
Very large list - partially loaded, full data in conversation context
Kapu/Balija comprehensive list - 506 entries (partial - A to L)
685 unique SC surnames from SC-reserved constituency candidates.
